name: Imperiali AG
message: Since Giovanni Imperiali founded the company in 1875, building has been in our blood. We consider helping to shape the world around us as our daily motivation. In doing so, we advance every project with in-depth knowledge and extensive experience. Ambitious and with a clear goal in mind, we rely on solid craftsmanship and state-of-the-art technology. We combine the tried and tested with the new and never lose sight of our focus: our customers and their needs imperiali.ch
